description_long: This is a modern, cubic bungalow with a flat roof and clean, minimalist lines. The exterior is predominantly white with large glass doors and windows facing a wooden deck area. The deck features a rectangular swimming pool, sun loungers, and is surrounded by palm and flowering trees, creating a resort-like atmosphere. A driveway with a parked car leads to the main entrance, which is subtly integrated into the facade. The landscaping includes a mix of paved surfaces and wooden decking, enhancing the contemporary aesthetic. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor living spaces and seamless indoor-outdoor transitions.
description: A modern white bungalow with a flat roof, large glass doors, a wooden deck, and a pool, surrounded by palm and flowering trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway with a car, pool, deck, and surrounding trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid white facade, minimal windows, and the driveway with the car.
description_view_2: Rear side view showing the pool, deck, and more of the landscaping with trees and seating area.
description_view_3: Back view featuring large glass doors, outdoor dining and lounge area, pool, and lush landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large glass doors and scattered windows
